pattern: \[Win32App\]\[ReportingManager\] Detection state for app with id: (?<id>{GUID}).*?"DetectedIdentityVersion":\{[^}]*?"NewValue":"(?<appVersion>[^"]+)"
description: Captures the product version IME detected after an app install (e.g. "11.2.1787.0"). Source: [ReportingManager] Detection state update with DetectedIdentityVersion.NewValue. Used by App Dashboard to show version-level failure breakdowns.
